Title: 2026 Climate Resilience Grant Program
Description: Supporting New York-based organizations, municipalities and State and Federally Recognized Tribal Nations, the Climate Resilience Grant Program provides grants to fight climate change.

Title: Emergency Resilience Grant · American Farmland Trust
Description: This grant program is designed to help farmers build resilience against disruptive events by providing critical funding for the development of business plans, financial strategies, operation diversification, and more.

Title: Sustainability Grant Program | City of Englewood, Colorado
Description: The City of Englewood defines sustainability as a city that stewards its resources for the benefit of current and future generations. The sustainability grants are intended to further sustainability through projects that will have lasting impacts in the City of Englewood.

Title: Funding Opportunity | U.S. Climate Resilience Toolkit
Description: A range of federal agencies and organizations commonly offer funding for climate adaptation or resilience-building projects. Check the external links below for opportunities that align with your needs.

Title: Community Resilience Grant Application Form Template | Paperform
Description: Ready to fund resilient communities? Start with Paperform's Community Resilience Grant Application template and turn good intentions into measurable impact.
